up.method: HPLC of samples (glucose monitored during cultivation); bacterial-specific qS not resolved from co-culture

growth_records.cite: Jnanada Shrikant Joshi et al. Novel Co-Cultivation Bioprocess with Immobilized Paenibacillus polymyxa and Scenedesmus obliquus for Lipid and Butanediol Production. Microorganisms (2025). DOI:10.3390/microorganisms13030606. [PMC11945626]
growth_records.snippet: co-cultivation with the chitosan-coated carrageenan bead-immobilized bacteria achieved a product formation of 10.06 +/- 0.23 g/L of 2,3-BDL ... the carrageenan beads enabled a 5.3% higher 2,3-BDL production compared to that with the alginat
growth_records.notes: Prokaryote product: 2,3-butanediol (2,3-BDL) titer = 10.06 +/- 0.23 g/L (immobilized in chitosan-coated carrageenan beads, co-cultured with S. obliquus). This is a titer (g/L), not a volumetric rate; cultivation duration for the shake-flask 2,3-BDL run not stated in main text, so productivity not computable. 52.9% higher than free cells => free-cell titer ~= 10.06/1.529 = 6.58 g/L. NOTE: the growth rate, doubling time, qS and Y(X/S) values in the paper's Tables 2/5 are for the microalga S. obliquus (a eukaryote), NOT for P. polymyxa, so they are excluded from this prokaryote record. Medium = PS medium (composition only in Supplementary), so medium_composition_stated=false. Culture at 26 C, 120 rpm, illuminated.

sec.method: HPLC; value BACK-CALCULATED from stated percentage differences (not directly quoted in text)

growth_records.cite: Jnanada Shrikant Joshi et al. Novel Co-Cultivation Bioprocess with Immobilized Paenibacillus polymyxa and Scenedesmus obliquus for Lipid and Butanediol Production. Microorganisms (2025). DOI:10.3390/microorganisms13030606. [PMC11945626]
growth_records.snippet: The calcium alginate and carrageenan beads achieved 45.1% and 52.9% higher 2,3-BDL concentrations compared to those achieved using the free cells
growth_records.notes: Free-cell 2,3-BDL titer not directly quoted; derived from the two stated percentage improvements: 10.06/1.529 = 6.58 g/L and 9.55/1.451 = 6.58 g/L (both converge on ~6.58 g/L). Immobilization (carrageenan +52.9%, alginate +45.1%) significantly outperformed free cells (ANOVA p<0.05). Titer, not a rate; duration not stated. PS medium composition only in Supplementary.
